titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 173: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 173. (A.R. No. 492 of 1925.) SEMBIYANMĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the central shrine, Kailāśanāthasvāmi temple.

Records the directive issued to the chaturvēdibhaṭṭa-ttāṉapperumakkaḷ of Sembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Aḷa-nāḍu, on the southern bank (of the river Kāvēri) founded by the queen śrī Parāntakaṉ Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Sembiyaṉmahādēviyār, the mother of (the king) Kaṇḍaṉ Madhurāntakadēvar alias Śrī Uttama-chōḷa, to feed themselves in the temple of Śrī-Kailāsam-uḍaiya mahādēvar on the day of the asterism of kēṭṭai in the month of Chittirai, the birthday of the queen, Sembiyanmahādēvi, with the interest on 507(1/2) kaḻañju of gold endowed for this purpose by Kaṇṇapparaśi alias Śoṉṉamahādēviyār (the queen of Uttama-chōḷa) (cf. A.R.Ep., 1925, No. 480). It is also mentioned that this charity was to be maintained out of the interest of the gifted amount only with the capital remained intact.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 383.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. kopparakesarivarmmakku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu [ kaṇṭaṉ maturān=taka] devarāṉa śrī Uttamacoḻadevaraiyt tiruvayiṟu vāytta Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār śrīparāntakaṉ
mātevaṭikaḷārāṉa śrīcempiyaṉ mahādeviyār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīcempiyaṉmahādeviccaturvetimaṅkalattu caturvedi[ bhaṭṭatāṉap]
perumakkaḷukku Ivvūr śrīkayilāsamuṭaiya mahādevar koyililey Ippirāṭṭiyār tiruṉāḷāṉa cittirait tirukkeṭṭai nāḷ meykkāṭṭi Uṇpatāka kaṇ
ṇapparaciyārāṉa coṉṉamahādeviyār Ivvūr (ūr) Ūrkkallāl kuṭutta poṉ 5 100 7ø Ippoṉ Ainnūṟṟu Eḻu kaḻañcaraiyum Iddharmam cantrātityavaṟ
niṟkum vaṇṇam Ippoṉ mutalaḻiyāmey Itaṉāl vanta bhogam Uṇṇappeṟuvārkaḷāka vaiyttatu .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
